title: Velvety Smoky Water Chestnut Stir-fry
description: A velvety smoky water chestnut dish perfect for a solo dinner with its rich and comforting flavors.
instructions: Boil water chestnuts in salted water for about 5 minutes, then drain and set aside.
Heat a wok or large frying pan with vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped green chili peppers and stir-fry until slightly softened.
Add grated ginger to the pan and cook for another minute until fragrant.
Stir in low sodium soy sauce and rock sugar, then add boiled water chestnuts. Stir everything together well.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for about 5 minutes or until mixture thickens.
Garnish with basil leaves just before serving.
